revision.comment: restoring the wrongly removed & quite necessary parent Category:Design
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

ategory

Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Commons category|Architectural design}} *'''[[Architecture|Architectural]] [[environmental design]]''' is the art of aesthetic and scientific structural design {{Category see also|Architectural styles}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Architecture|Design]] [[Category:Design]] [[Category:Environmental design]] [[Category:refreshing redirects]]
}} [[Category:Categories with 4 members]] [[en:Category:Architectural design]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Commons category|Architectural design}} *'''[[:en:Architecture|Architectural]] [[:en:Environmental design|Environmental design]]''' is the art of aesthetic and scientific structural design {{Category see also|Architectural styles}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:Architectural design]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Architecture|Design]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Design]] [[Category:Environmental design]] [[Category:Original categories]]
